items.title: Fix CompileAndRun crash
items.description: ConsoleUtilSSE-style relocation fix (RELOCATION_ID 441582 for patch >= 1130). Credit: VersuchDrei/ConsoleUtilSSE, MIT License.

items.title: SEH crash protection
items.description: __try/__except around CompileAndRun catches access violations safely.

items.title: God mode via direct API
items.description: Static bool flip via RELOCATION_ID(517711, 404238). No console command.

items.title: Collision toggle via direct API
items.description: TESObjectREFR::SetCollision(). No console command.

items.title: Time control via direct API
items.description: Calendar::gameHour->value direct write for SetGameTime.

items.title: Connection health monitoring
items.description: Ping action for pipe connectivity check.

items.title: Named pipe architecture
items.description: SKSE plugin pipe server + C# MCP pipe client. JSON protocol, newline-delimited.

items.title: SKSE task thread dispatch
items.description: All game API calls marshaled to game thread via SKSE::GetTaskInterface with promise/future.

items.title: Static linking
items.description: x64-windows-static vcpkg triplet eliminates external DLL dependencies.

items.title: HUD notifications
items.description: RE::DebugNotification for in-game messages. Auto-notify on god mode, collision, items, stats, save.

items.title: Console command execution
items.description: ExecuteConsoleCommand with output capture via lastMessage. Dot-notation for NPC targeting (refId.command).

items.title: Async save game
items.description: BGSSaveLoadManager::Save() with fire-and-forget from Protocol. Auto-names from player info.

items.title: Event system noise filtering
items.description: Hardcoded suppression of framework quests (FEBD3801, 000F9075). Poll filters: eventTypes, excludeTypes.

items.title: prid doesn't persist between calls
items.description: Workaround: use dot-notation (refId.command). Tool descriptions updated to guide AI to correct pattern.

items.title: Save game timeout
items.description: Fixed via async save — responds immediately, save completes in background.

items.title: Teleport via direct API
items.description: Currently works via coc console command. No clean direct API found yet.

items.title: Force load save via MCP
items.description: BGSSaveLoadManager::Load() to load a save directly without going through main menu.

items.title: Force new game via MCP
items.description: Trigger new game initialization directly, bypassing main menu.

items.title: CTD on loading save after MCP character replication session
items.description: ROOT CAUSE: po3_SaveUnbaker.dll crashing in NPC::LoadGame::thunk (Hooks.cpp:51) with null RCX. Not our plugin. RECOMMENDATION: Disable po3_SaveUnbaker when switching saves during MCP sessions.

items.title: Player info query
items.description: Name, race, level, health/magicka/stamina (current+base), position, cell, worldspace.

items.title: Full inventory read
items.description: All items with FormID, name, count, weight, value, type classification.

items.title: Gold count
items.description: Direct gold query via inventory filter.

items.title: Add/remove items
items.description: AddObjectToContainer/RemoveItem with FormID resolution.

items.title: Set actor values
items.description: All 18 skills + health/magicka/stamina via AsActorValueOwner()->SetActorValue().

items.title: Equip/unequip items
items.description: ActorEquipManager::EquipObject/UnequipObject.

items.title: Add/remove spells
items.description: PlayerCharacter::AddSpell, console command fallback for remove.

items.title: Add/remove perks
items.description: PlayerCharacter::AddPerk, console command fallback for remove.

items.title: Active effects query
items.description: AsMagicTarget()->GetActiveEffectList() with magnitude, duration, elapsed.

items.title: Skill levels query
items.description: GetSkillLevels — all 18 skills with current and base values. Tested 2026-03-21.

items.title: Perks query
items.description: GetPerks — 708 perks returned (was 12 in old build). Now shows runtime vs base source. Tested 2026-03-21.

items.title: Known spells query
items.description: GetKnownSpells — 1,394 spells (807 spells, 476 abilities, 102 lesser powers, 5 powers, 6 schools). Tested 2026-03-21.

items.title: Known shouts query
items.description: GetKnownShouts — 52 shouts with full per-word detail. Tested 2026-03-21.

items.title: Equipped items query
items.description: GetEquippedItems — 8 equipped slots returned correctly. Tested 2026-03-21.

items.title: Unlock shouts
items.description: UnlockShout — teachword + unlockword. Tested 2026-03-21: Disarm shout unlocked, count 52→55.

items.title: Character blueprint export
items.description: GetCharacterBlueprint — 627KB file, 1395 spells, 708 perks, 52 shouts, 256 items, 946 effects. OutputPath writes to disk. Tested 2026-03-21.

items.title: Level management
items.description: Set level, add XP, show XP to next level.

items.title: Appearance query
items.description: GetAppearance — race, sex, height, weight, 19 face morphs, 29 head parts, carry weight. Tested 2026-03-21.

items.title: Carry weight query
items.description: Included in GetAppearance. carryWeight=10837, carryWeightBase=300. Tested 2026-03-21.

items.title: Favorites query
items.description: GetFavorites — 12 favorites (3 shouts, 9 spells). Tested 2026-03-21.

items.title: Inventory enchantments + display names
items.description: GetInventory now returns displayName and enchantment with full effect list.

items.title: NPC FormID confusion — refId vs baseId
items.description: get_nearby_npcs now returns both refId and baseId.

items.title: Hit events misattributed
items.description: Hit events now include targetRole/attackerRole.

items.title: Blueprint export to file via outputPath
items.description: Writes full JSON to disk, returns summary only. Tested: 130KB and 627KB outputs.

items.title: Bulk add items
items.description: BulkAddItems — JSON array of {formId, count}. Tested: 36 items, 0 failures.

items.title: Weather control
items.description: GetWeather works. SetWeather works with FormID but name search errors out. Needs editorID fallback for modded weather.

items.title: Cell info query
items.description: GetCellInfo — cell name, interior/exterior, worldspace, position, facing angle. Tested 2026-03-21.

items.title: Unlock door/container
items.description: Tool wrapper returns 'script command not found' but raw console command works. Formatting issue.

items.title: Lock door/container
items.description: Same wrapper formatting issue as UnlockDoor. Raw console works. Tested 2026-03-21.

items.title: Read container contents
items.description: GetContainerInventory — Fish Barrel, 3 items. Tested 2026-03-21.

items.title: Discover all map markers
items.description: DiscoverAllMapMarkers via tmm 1. Tested 2026-03-21: tmm 0 first, then restored all markers.

items.description: GetNearbyObjects — 573 objects in Riften exterior. Tested 2026-03-21.

infrastructure.title: Event system
infrastructure.description: 17 event types via ScriptEventSourceHolder sinks. PollEvents with filters.

infrastructure.title: Load order query
infrastructure.description: GetLoadOrder + GetModFormIdPrefix for ESP/ESL index lookup.

infrastructure.title: VPrint hook
infrastructure.description: Full console output capture for multi-line command results.

infrastructure.title: Config file
infrastructure.description: .ini or .toml for pipe name, log level, feature toggles.

infrastructure.title: Performance caching
infrastructure.description: Cache frequently queried data to reduce game thread blocking.

infrastructure.title: Push events via pipe
infrastructure.description: Pipe Protocol v2 — unsolicited event messages from plugin to client.

infrastructure.title: Plugin DI system
infrastructure.description: Dynamic integration with detected SKSE plugins.

infrastructure.title: Console output capture incomplete
infrastructure.description: lastMessage only captures last line. VPrint hook needed.

keyDiscoveries: Dot-notation console commands work: refId.command correctly targets NPCs.
get_nearby_npcs returns reference IDs. setessential needs base FormID, kill/prid need ref ID.
CompileAndRun needs RELOCATION_ID 441582 for Skyrim >= 1.6.1130 (ConsoleUtilSSE approach).
Event system captures everything but framework quests (NFF etc.) spam start/stop events.
Save game with 4000+ plugins takes 10+ seconds — async fire-and-forget is required.
Static linking (x64-windows-static) required — dynamic linking causes SKSE load failure.
Blueprint outputPath is essential — full blueprint JSON for modded characters is 130KB-627KB, overflows MCP context window without it.
Bulk add items (36 items, 0 failures) works reliably for character replication.
GetPerks new build returns 708 perks (was 12) — old build only iterated base perks.
GetKnownSpells new build returns 1,394 spells (was 1) — old build had broken spell iteration.
GetAppearance returns full face morphs (19 values), head parts (29 entries including HDT hair), and carry weight.
SetWeather name search fails but direct FormID works — Sky::ForceWeather() API is fine, name resolution needs fix.
UnlockDoor/LockDoor tool wrappers return 'script command not found' but raw console commands work — formatting issue.
BUG-007 CTD was po3_SaveUnbaker.dll, not our plugin — closed as external.
UnlockShout confirmed working — Disarm shout taught, count 52→55.
KillActor confirmed working — hostile rabbit killed, returns wasEssential/wasProtected flags.
GetCrosshairRef confirmed — returns actor details including race, level, essential, dead status.
DiscoverAllMapMarkers confirmed — tmm 0 then discover restored all markers.
